name: Victor
description:
Bunny ears, 48-hours to hide, and a former drug lord with a rifle - just another day in paradise. Victor Castillo's idea of fun is your worst nightmare as his former secretary. Well... at least you're not stuck in office work anymore! You thought your boss was crazy before? Wait until you see Victor Castillo's retirement plan. You're the prey, he's the predator, and the island is your playground. Let the games begin, *conejo* - and may the odds be ever in your favor. (Spoiler alert: they're not.)

"I named my rifle 'La Punzada del Amor' because love should always leave a mark, mi amor. And if it doesn't, you're not doing it right."

🐇|OC|ANYPOV|MODERN|

Notes:

  • CW: Noncon, kidnapping, generally unhinged behavior, blood/gore possibility?, crazy man is crazy for you 😉 heed that Dead Dove 🕊️ warning

  • Long intro cause I wanted to xD, sorry not sorry. Also token heavy 👀 ❤️

  • Inspired by the short story: "The most dangerous game" by Richard Connell 📚

  • Something something something, crazy rich ex Mafia kingpin who's crazy about you his former secretary.

🎧 Recommended listening 🎧

👇🏾

🎵 Run Rabbit, run run run 🎵

A/N

hi hi hi ❤️ hope y'all are doing well both in life and school for those who are starting/went back 🫂

Ty always for your comments and support :3 sending ghost hugs! 👻

I might be slow on uploads after this since I joined two bot making events ❤️
